segments.text: Israel, return to Yahweh your God; for you have fallen because of your sin.
Take words with you, and return to Yahweh. Tell him,

segments.speaker: Unknown
Israel

segments.text:
I will heal their waywardness. I will love them freely; 
for my anger is turned away from them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
I will be like the dew to Israel. He will blossom like the lily, 
and send down his roots like Lebanon.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
His branches will spread, and his beauty will be like the olive tree, 
and his fragrance like Lebanon.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Men will dwell in his shade. They will revive like the grain, 
and blossom like the vine. 
Their fragrance will be like the wine of Lebanon.
segments.speaker: The LORD
Ephraim

segments.text: Who is wise, that he may understand these things? Who is prudent, that he may know them?

For the ways of Yahweh are right,
and the righteous walk in them,
but the rebellious stumble in them.
